response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video to identify scene changes (talk segments vs. song performances). 2. Identified 'Tokubetsu Chuushite' and 'Tenten-Tenten Tengoku' via on-screen metadata. 3. Used web search to confirm composers/lyricists (鹿乃/渡辺翔 for Song 1; 夕日ヨシミ/Alobahn for Song 2). 4. Transcribed lyrics directly from the on-screen text shown during the performances to ensure accuracy, as they are official lyrics shown during the performance. 5. Constructed JSON following the required schema.
response.global_summary: The video features a vocal concert performance by Hololive ID VTubers, performing two songs: 'Tokubetsu Chuushite' (followed by a short intermission) and 'Tenten-Tenten Tengoku'.

scenes.description: The video starts with Kobo Kanaeru giving an introductory greeting and setting up the performance. No vocal music is playing.
The performance of the song 'Tokubetsu Chuushite' begins, performed by Kobo Kanaeru, Kureiji Ollie, Moona Hoshinova, Pavolia Reine, and Anya Melfissa. Lyrics are shown on screen.
